n_estimators.description: Number of boosting rounds (trees) to build.

num_leaves.description: Maximum number of leaves per tree; the main complexity control for leaf-wise growth.

learning_rate.description: Step-size shrinkage applied to each tree's contribution.

max_depth.description: Maximum tree depth; -1 means no limit (constrained by num_leaves).

subsample.description: Fraction of training rows sampled per boosting round (bagging).

colsample_bytree.description: Fraction of features sampled when constructing each tree.
